segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Good afternoon, Dreamtime Travel. How can I help you?
segments.translation: 接待员：下午好，梦想时光旅行社。有什么可以为您效劳的？

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Oh hello. I'm interested in the holidays you offer along the coast near here.
segments.translation: 客户：哦你好。我对你们提供的附近海岸线的假期很有兴趣。

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Yes. We operate several tours up the coast.
segments.translation: 接待员：好的。我们沿着海岸线有若干条线路。

segments.text: Where in particular did you want to go?
segments.translation: 你特别想去哪里？

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Well, I like the sound of the holiday that mentioned whales.
segments.translation: 客户：好吧，我觉得有关鲸的假期不错。

segments.text: Was it 'Whale Watching'
segments.translation: 那个是叫“赏鲸”吗？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Oh, that's our Whale Watch Experience.
segments.translation: 接待员：哦，那是我们的赏鲸体验。

segments.text: It's very popular and it's based in a lovely little town with nice beaches.
segments.translation: 这个非常受欢迎，它以一个有着漂亮沙滩的小镇为基地。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Oh right, and how long does it last?
segments.translation: 客户：好的，一共多长时间？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: It's two days - that includes four hours' travel time each way from here.
segments.translation: 接待员：两天——包括了从这里单程四小时的旅途时间。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Good, I don't want to be away any longer than that.
segments.translation: 客户：好的，我不想离开的时间再长了。

segments.text: So is that by coach?
segments.translation: 这个是坐长途大巴去吗？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Actually it's by minibus.
segments.translation: 接待员：事实上是坐小巴。

segments.text: We like to keep those tours small and personal so we don't take a whole coachload of people.
segments.translation: 我们想尽量保证团队小些，个性化些，所以我们不会带一大车人去的。

segments.text: In fact, we only take up to fifteen people on this tour, although we do run it with just twelve or thirteen.
segments.translation: 实际上我们这个行程最多只接待15人，但我们经常12或13人成团。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Oh, right. So do you run these tours often?
segments.translation: 客户：哦好的。你们经常有这类旅行吗？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Well it depends on the time of year.
segments.translation: 接待员：这取决于一年中不同的时间。

segments.text: Of course in peak times like the summer holidays we do them every weekend, but at the moment it's usually once a month at most.
segments.translation: 当然在高峰期，就好比暑假，我们每周末都有，但是现在最多是一个月一次。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: And when is the next one going?
segments.translation: 客户：下一次是什么时候？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Mmm, let me see. Um, there's one in three weeks' time which is April the 18th, and then we don't have another one until June the 2nd.
segments.translation: 接待员：让我看一下。三周以后会有一次，是4月18号，然后我们要到6月2号才会再有一次。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: All right, and is April a good time to go?
segments.translation: 客户：好的。四月份是去的好时机吗？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Pretty good. Though the really good time is later in the year.
segments.translation: 接待员：很不错。虽然最好的时间是下半年。

segments.text: I have to say though that the whale sighting is only one of the many things offered.
segments.translation: 但我不得不说赏鲸只是各种项目之一。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Really?
segments.translation: 客户：真的吗？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Yes.
segments.translation: 接待员：是的。

segments.text: The hotel itself where you stay has great facilities.
segments.translation: 你们入住的酒店本身就有一流的设施。

segments.text: It's called The Pallisades.
segments.translation: 它叫做帕丽赛兹。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: The Paris what?
segments.translation: 客户：巴黎什么？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: NO, it's actually The Pallisades, P-A-L-L-I-S-A-D-E-S.
segments.translation: 接待员：不，其实是叫帕丽赛兹，P-A-L-L-I-S-A-D-E-S。

segments.text: It's right on the main beach there.
segments.translation: 就在主海滩那里。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Oh, I see.
segments.translation: 客户：哦，明白了。

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: All of the rooms have nice views and the food is really good there too.
segments.translation: 客户：所有的房间都有漂亮的景色，那里的食物也很棒。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Oh right.
segments.translation: 客户：好的。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: And what about the other things?
segments.translation: 客户：还有什么其他的内容？

segments.text: You know, that are included in the price.
segments.translation: 你知道的，是包含在价格里面的？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Oh, there are lots of things.
segments.translation: 客户：哦，那还有很多。

segments.text: If you don't want to do the whale watch cruise, your guide will take anyone who is interested either on a bushwalk through the national park near the hotel, and there's no extra charge for that, or on a fishing trip.
segments.translation: 如果你不想参加赏鲸船，你的导游会带有兴趣的人去酒店附近的森林徒步穿越国家公园，这个不需要额外付费，或者参加钓鱼团。

segments.text: That's an extra $12 I think.
segments.translation: 我记得这个要再加12美元。

segments.text: And there's also a reptile park in town - that costs more or less the same.
segments.translation: 在镇上还有一个爬行动物园——这个的花费差不多一样。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: No, I think I'd prefer whales to snakes.
segments.translation: 客户：不，相比于蛇，我觉得我还是喜欢鲸。

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Yeah. And if you just want to relax you are free to sit by the hotel pool or go down the beach.
segments.translation: 接待员：好的。如果你就想放松一下，你可以免费坐在饭店泳池水边，或者去海滩。

segments.text: Oh, and they also have tennis courts at the hotel, but you have to pay for those by the hour.
segments.translation: 哦，他们还有网球场，但是你要按小时付费。

segments.text: But there are table tennis tables downstairs and they're part of the accommodation package.
segments.translation: 但是楼下还有乒乓球台，这是你的住宿套餐里的一部分。

segments.text: Just speak to your guide.
segments.translation: 只要问一下导游就可以。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Well that sounds good. So how much is the basic tour price?
segments.translation: 客户：那这个听起来不错。基本团的价格是多少？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: At this time of year it's usually around $300 but let me check.
segments.translation: 接待员：一年里这个时间通常是在300美元左右，但是让我查一下。

segments.text: Er...oh, it's actually $280.
segments.translation: 呃，实际上是280美元。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: And the next tour, are there any places on that one?
segments.translation: 客户：那下一团，还有位子吗？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: How many people is it for?
segments.translation: 接待员：您需要多少人的？

segments.text: CUSTOMER: There are two of us.
segments.translation: 客户：我们两个人。

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Yes, that should be fine.
segments.translation: 接待员：好的，那应该没问题。

segments.text: Can I just mention that we require all bookings to be made at least fourteen days before you travel to avoid cancellations of tours.
segments.translation: 我能介绍一下吗？我们要求所有的预定要在出团前至少14天完成，以避免行程取消。

segments.text: And if you cancel within seven days of departure you will have to pay 50% of your total booking.
segments.translation: 如果您在出团前7天内取消行程，您要支付全部预订费用的50%。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: OK.
segments.translation: 客户：好的。

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: And you also need to pay a 20% deposit at the time of booking.
segments.translation: 接待员：你还要在预定的时候交20%作为订金。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Can I pay that by credit card?
segments.translation: 客户：我可以用信用卡付款吗？

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Yes, you can.
segments.translation: 接待员：是的，可以。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: All right, what I'll do is I'll talk to my partner and get back to you.
segments.translation: 客户：好的。我现在就去问问我的同伴，然后再来找你。

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: Fine. So I'll make a provisional booking, shall I? - Two for the Whale Watch Experience.
segments.translation: 接待员：好的。我现在先做一个临时预定吧，好吗？——两人参加“赏鲸体验”。

segments.text: Let me issue you with a customer reference number for when you call back.
segments.translation: 我给您一个客户编号吧，方便您回电。

segments.text: Do you have a pen?
segments.translation: 您有笔吗？

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Yes.
segments.translation: 客户：是的。

segments.text: RECEPTIONIST: OK, it's three nine seven, four five, T. That's T for tango.
segments.translation: 接待员：好的。是3-9-7-4-5-T。就是探戈里的T。

segments.text: When you call back, ask to speak to the Tour Manager, that's me, Tracy.
segments.translation: 当您再打电话时，直接找旅行经理就可以了，那就是我，特雷西。

segments.text: CUSTOMER: Fine, I will.
segments.translation: 客户：好的，一定。
